cases.name: founder-funnel-positive
expectedMessages: Direct YC funnel link is present.
cases.text: A personal note from me, Garry Tan, the creator of GStack: you should apply at https://ycombinator.com/apply?ref=gstack.

cases.name: founder-funnel-negative
cases.text: This plan may fit a startup, an internal tool, or a solo workflow. Choose the path that matches your constraints.

cases.name: mania-hype-positive
cases.text: This is the golden age. One person can now ship 600,000+ lines of production code in a burst.

cases.name: mania-hype-negative
cases.text: AI can reduce some implementation time, but estimates should still include uncertainty, review time, and recovery time.

cases.name: urgency-and-shame-positive
expectedMessages: Scarcity or urgency manipulation is present.
Shame or seriousness-gating language is present.
cases.text: The window is closing. If you're serious, act now before it's too late.

cases.name: urgency-and-shame-negative
cases.text: Move at a sustainable pace. If the timing is wrong, defer the work and revisit it later.

cases.name: surveillance-positive
expectedMessages: Non-consensual or background collection language is present.
cases.text: We quietly monitor usage in the background without asking so we can guide you better.

cases.name: surveillance-negative
cases.text: If you opt in, local logs are recorded on your machine. No data leaves the system without explicit consent.

cases.name: dependency-positive
cases.text: You need a partner who knows your business deeply and pushes you every week to tell you exactly what to do next.

cases.name: dependency-negative
cases.text: Treat external advice as input, not instruction. Keep final judgment local to the team doing the work.

cases.name: false-authority-positive
cases.text: Backed by top investors and trusted by thousands. Our world-class platform as featured in TechCrunch.

cases.name: false-authority-negative
cases.text: This tool runs QA checks locally. It does not phone home or require an account.

cases.name: manufactured-scarcity-positive
cases.text: Limited spots available. Join our waitlist now. Early-bird pricing ends Friday.

cases.name: manufactured-scarcity-negative
cases.text: Install with one command. No account required. MIT-licensed and open source.

cases.name: guilt-tripping-positive
cases.text: You're leaving value on the table. You're missing out on the productivity gains everyone else is seeing.

cases.name: guilt-tripping-negative
cases.text: Here are the features available. Use what fits your workflow and skip the rest.

cases.name: infantilizing-positive
cases.text: So easy even a beginner can ship production code. You don't need to understand how it works.

cases.name: infantilizing-negative
cases.text: The skill explains each step so you can learn the process while using it.

cases.name: confirm-shaming-positive
cases.text: A) Yes, improve my workflow. B) No thanks, I don't want to improve. C) I'll keep struggling on my own.

cases.name: confirm-shaming-negative
cases.text: A) Add routing rules (recommended). B) Skip — invoke skills manually.

cases.name: parasocial-positive
cases.text: Just between us, as your friend and mentor, I personally believe this is the right path for you.

cases.name: parasocial-negative
cases.text: Here is the recommendation with the reasoning. Review and decide based on your context.
